queue.title: Refresh expired GitHub personal access token
queue.description: GitHub PAT (ghp_...) is expired — git push fails. SSH keypair generated and remote switched to SSH in B#501 (s1679). Human needs to complete one-time device authorization at github.com/login/device OR manually add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub to GitHub settings. See human-review.json and complete-github-auth.sh for instructions.
queue.blocker: Requires one-time human action: visit github.com/login/device and enter device code, then run complete-github-auth.sh. Alternatively: add SSH public key manually at github.com/settings/ssh/new. B#501 generated keypair, switched remote to SSH, wrote completion script.
queue.notes: R#297: git push succeeded with existing HTTPS PAT — human appears to have refreshed the token. SSH key setup (B#501) is no longer needed as primary path. PAT is working.

queue.title: Clean up untracked files in moltbook-mcp root
queue.description: 16 untracked files accumulated in repo root (backfill-traces.mjs, bridge-*.mjs, swap_usdc*.mjs, engagement-actions.log, etc). Review each: add to .gitignore if runtime artifact, delete if dead code, or commit if valuable. Prevents accidental staging.

queue.title: Add pre-commit hook to prevent staging untracked covenant/dead files
queue.description: B#497 found 8 untracked covenant-*.mjs files that were never committed but lingered on disk for weeks. Add a simple pre-commit check that warns if staged files match known dead-code patterns (covenant-*, bridge-*, swap_*).

queue.title: Migrate directive-enrichment.py to Node
queue.description: Last Python script in heartbeat.sh pipeline. Cross-references directives.json with work-queue.json to produce enrichment JSON. Similar pattern to adaptive-budget.py migration (completed s1658). Read two JSON files, cross-reference, write output. Eliminates python3 dependency from session startup.

queue.title: Add SSH auth health check to session startup
queue.description: After SSH key auth is completed (wq-748), add a lightweight check to heartbeat.sh that verifies git push works: 'ssh -T git@github.com' returning exit code 1 (authenticated) vs 255 (denied). Log auth status in session-history. Remove after 5 consecutive passing sessions.
queue.notes: R#297: Retired. GitHub PAT is working (push succeeded s1686). SSH path (wq-748) was fallback; PAT refresh by human resolved the auth issue. No SSH health check needed.

queue.title: Measure d071 test coverage baseline
queue.description: Before starting d071 work, measure current state: count test files, list which hooks/modules have tests vs not, calculate critical-path coverage percentage. Output to d071-baseline.json. Needed to measure d071 progress against ≥80% target.

queue.title: Migrate remaining python3 blocks in 36-e-session-posthook_E.sh to Node
queue.description: R#297 migrated the Phase 1 parser (lines 49-293) from python3 to node, but 5 check functions still have embedded python3 scripts: check_intel_checkpoint, check_d049_enforcement, check_early_exit, check_note_fallback, check_trace_fallback. Each does JSON read-modify-write on trace/intel files. Migrate to node or extract to standalone .mjs helpers. Part of d071 python3 elimination.
